entity.summary: Arbitrum perpetual decentralized exchange with zero current TVL in the reviewed registry snapshot but substantial historical trading volume and preserved protocol identity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Equation V3 as an Arbitrum perpetual DEX and reports zero current TVL alongside substantial cumulative DEX volume and historical fee generation. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active status. A stable first-party website surface was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: EquationDAO official social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used as identity corroboration.

evidence.title: Equation V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Equation V3 as an Arbitrum perpetual DEX and reports zero current TVL, substantial cumulative DEX volume, and historical fee generation, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Equation V3 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Equation V3 as an Arbitrum decentralized derivatives exchange.
